variants.title: Donaldson P127172 Air Primary, Round
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P127172 Air Primary, Round provides clean, efficient airflow for engines by trapping airborne contaminants. Its round design maximizes filtration surface area while maintaining high airflow rates. Perfect for heavy-duty applications, this air primary filter enhances engine longevity and supports consistent performance.
specifications: Style: Air Primary, Round, Outer Diameter: 201.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 92.0 mm
